description: Jannik Sinner is out of Roland-Garros. 2026! The world No. 1, on a 30-match winning streak and the overwhelming favourite for the only major missing from his collection, led Juan Manuel Cerúndolo by two sets and 5-1 – and then his body gave way in the heat. The Argentine, ranked outside the top 50, came back to win 3-6, 2-6, 7-5, 6-1, 6-1.
